positioning: A provisional streaming early-warning layer on top of the batch-authoritative MetaSignal core.
hard_rule: Streaming alerts may trigger investigation or pause-for-review, but never final experiment decisions.

capabilities.principle: Detect split issues early, but batch confirms validity.
Detect platform-specific event drops before daily batch readout.
Surface processing delay and prevent false realtime confidence.
Count late arrivals while preserving batch authority.
Detect duplicate event IDs before provisional metric use.
Quarantine malformed events instead of silently including them.
Realtime anomaly alerts trigger investigation only.
Streaming gives speed, batch gives authority, reconciliation gives trust.
